prompt: Fill in the sorry in AutomatedProofs/JEPA.lean for ONLY the lemma preconditioner_integral_bounded (line ~446). Leave all other sorries untouched. The proof should use change-of-variables: the diagonal ODE lower bound (passed as hypothesis h_sigma1_lb) gives sigma_1 grows at rate >= C * lambda_1* * sigma_1^{(2L-1)/L}, so dt <= dsigma_1 / (C * lambda_1* * sigma_1^{(2L-1)/L}). Substituting gives integral of preconditioner <= (L / (C * lambda_1*)) * integral of sigma_1^{-1/L} dsigma_1, which is finite for L >= 2 since -1/L > -1. Helper lemmas in AutomatedProofs/Lemmas.lean are available.
